creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: joneum
Date: Sun Jun 16 09:54:55 UTC 2019
New revision: 504293
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/504293

Log:
  Update to 1.4.1

  * Give Maintainership to Submitter
  * New dependency to graphics/png
  * Add porlint suggestions
  * libxml2 and tlparser are no longer required
  * server.tglpub file is no longer required. As consequence, etc
    directory is not required to being installed and Makefile.in file is
    not required to being patched either
  * strip telegram-purple.so library

  PR:		238125
  Submitted by:	jjuanino@gmail.com
  Sponsored by:	Netzkommune GmbH

Changes:
  head/net-im/telegram-purple/Makefile
  head/net-im/telegram-purple/distinfo
  head/net-im/telegram-purple/files/patch-Makefile.in
  head/net-im/telegram-purple/files/patch-commit.h.gen
  head/net-im/telegram-purple/files/patch-tgl_tl-parser_portable__endian.h
  head/net-im/telegram-purple/pkg-plist
